title: ferray-polynomial: roots uses internal QR iteration instead of ferray-linalg eigvals
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

roots.rs has its own QR iteration (qr_eigenvalues) for companion matrix eigenvalues, plus balance_matrix and newton_polish. The comment says 'Uses a built-in QR iteration since ferray-linalg may not yet be available.' ferray-linalg is now available and has eig/eigvals backed by faer, which is more numerically robust than a hand-written QR iteration. Delegate to ferray-linalg::eigvals for the companion matrix eigenvalues. This also enables complex eigenvalue support for free.
